old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ijsr","title":"[security] inconsistent Schnorr48 verification between Rust/C impls","description":"Rust version (lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs:111-124) performs defense-in-depth: canonical bytes check for s, ZERO check, is_identity, is_torsion_free on pubkey. C version (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:426-432,443) only checks nonzero s (non-ct branch) and relies on monocypher recover_r. No equivalent pubkey validation. Violates \"all impls MUST produce identical output for test vectors\" and misses timing/DoS protections. Last touched in 39c26b888 (merge conflict cleanup in schnorr48.c). Affects MIC verification and link auth. See also link_ctx key handling and rx path in lichen_link_rx.c:139.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:33:20.814880363Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:33:20.814880363Z"}

new_value: {"notes":"schnorr48_pubkey_valid + checks in verify_frame/verify + rx path to match Rust defense-in-depth for pubkey (low-order/identity/torsion-free). Fixed inconsistent verification and test vectors. Compiled and unit test passed."}
